0.text: Diffuse mild ectasia in the bronchial structures of both lungs, more prominent centrally

1.text: Diffuse peribronchial thickening in the bronchial structures of both lungs, more prominent centrally

2.text: Areas of increased density in the peribronchial area of the lower lobe of the right lung

3.text: Indistinct ground glass opacity in the peribronchial area of the lower lobe of the right lung

4.text: Consolidation in the peribronchial area of the lower lobe of the right lung

5.text: Tree-in-bud appearance in the peribronchial area of the lower lobe of the right lung
